form.formComment: Good performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Q Straight over 300m (16.60) beating Piper Beach in Grade 5 on April 6. Expected to measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Q Straight over 300m (16.60) beating Piper Beach in Grade 5 on April 6. Expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a 3 length third (19.93) over 352m at this track. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a 3 length third (19.93) over 352m at this track. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 390m at this track. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 390m at this track. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when fifth (20.11) at this track. Awkwardly drawn and will need to find best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when fifth (20.11) at this track. Awkwardly drawn and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (20.01) at big odds over 352m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (20.01) at big odds over 352m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head outwards in the direction for several strides at the 150m.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.75 lengths in 19.57, beating Golden Label. Last start finished 4th on April 11 over 457m at this track behind Big Al's beaten 11 lengths (26.04) in a Grade 5. Can't recommend in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.75 lengths in 19.57, beating Golden Label. Last start finished 4th on April 11 over 457m at this track behind Big Al's beaten 11 lengths (26.04) in a Grade 5. Can't recommend in this field.

form.formComment: Returns from a four-and-a-half months break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed over 300m at Q Straight. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a four-and-a-half months break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed over 300m at Q Straight. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but could manage only second (20.01) at this track over 352m. Has a fast 19.67 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but could manage only second (20.01) at this track over 352m. Has a fast 19.67 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Q Straight over 350m. Must be included.

formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Q Straight over 350m. Must be included.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last three starts, most recently over 350m at Q Straight. Has ability and can feature with the right run.
